description:
LightCrosshair is a Windows desktop application that provides a customizable crosshair overlay for gaming and other applications.

LightCrosshair provides an on-screen crosshair overlay with FPS monitoring, frame timing, GPU driver integration, and extensive customization options.
LightCrosshair 1.7.0 fixes NVIDIA FPS cap profile binding for selected application profiles, adds NVIDIA profile audit information, adds per-app NVIDIA Low Latency and VSync controls, and displays read-only NVIDIA G-SYNC and Low Latency CPL state. It also isolates NVIDIA profile operations in a helper process, polishes GPU Driver tab layout, initializes Frame Cap Assistant recommendations from safe primary-display refresh-rate data, and preserves safe asInvoker operation.
